creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The Tulip Festival is back at this incredible fairytale castle in England and it is breathtaking. This is @arundelcastleuk and now is the perfect time to visit with everything in bloom 🌷

It’s one of England’s largest inhabited and complete castles and you can spend hours exploring the grounds, the gardens, the castle itself and the bedrooms.

🚝 You can take the Southern railway directly to Arundel station and walk 10 mins to the castle from there!
📍Arundel Castle, High St, Arundel BN18 9LH
🎟️ Tickets for the gardens only start from £17 per person, and you can add on visiting the castle for £29 per person

#arundelcastle #tulipfestival

transcription.text: fun day trips from london part two and this time we're going to a magical fairy tale castle that has been transformed into tulip heaven now is the best time to visit and it's less than two hours away from london this is arendelle castle and it is massive in fact it's one of the largest inhabited and complete castles in england there is so much to see here including the tulip festival and you can get a ticket that covers the gardens the grounds the castle itself and the bedrooms you can easily spend hours exploring everything here and afterwards you can explore the medieval town it is so worth a visit find all the details in the caption
